sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36811" key="e)ca/ntion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξάντιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἑξᾶς,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
